title: DDL, Constraints, Schema Evolution, and Integrity Repair · Result-Grain Case: Integrity Repair
summary: The support schema must reject impossible states and evolve while old application versions are still active. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql integrity repair increment in a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement.
Plan backward-compatible expand, backfill, verify, switch, and contract phases with rollback evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Predict Integrity Repair · Theory Integrity Repair
steps.instruction:
theory case — Import ticket 206 twice, reassign one unowned ticket, reject an invalid severity, and migrate a required category field without breaking the old writer. Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Integrity Repair contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Integrity Repair · Theory Integrity Repair.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement. For Predict Integrity Repair · Theory Integrity Repair, keep Integrity Repair connected to executable relational evidence.
